name: Red Chile Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried red chiles (such as ancho, poblano, or jalapeño)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep saucepan over medium heat until it reaches 350°F (175°C).
2. Remove the pan from the heat and carefully add the dried red chiles.
3. Allow the mixture to cool for about 10 minutes, then cover the pan and let it stand at room temperature for 12 to 24 hours. The longer it sits, the stronger the flavor will become.
4. After the desired time has passed, strain the oil through a fine-mesh sieve into another heat-safe container.
5. Use the infused oil as you would any other vegetable oil in cooking or frying.
